markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Innerwell and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and site improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Condition Hub strategy needs reconsideration; focus on tier 3/4 content and patient-centric topics](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [LLM presence tracking is directional; improvement over time is key metric](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Site performance issues identified; core web vitals and internal linking need attention](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [Review page optimization and location page improvements suggested for better SEO](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)

## Topics

### LLM Presence Tracking

  - [Using Scrunch to track LLM presence across various topics](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Presence ranges from 2% to low 20s across different accounts](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [No established benchmarks due to the novelty of LLM tracking](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Focus on improvement over time rather than specific targets](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Need to be intentional about selecting and updating tracked keywords](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

### Content Strategy Reevaluation

  - [Current focus on Condition Hub challenged by Noa](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Concerns about competing with established health institutions (e.g., Oxford University)](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Suggestion to focus on more specific, situation-based content](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Example of successful content: "Will Ketamine show up on my drug test?"](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Proposal to invert strategy: focus on solutions (e.g., ketamine) first, then branch into conditions](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

### Site Performance Issues

  - [Core Web Vitals problems identified on both mobile and desktop](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
  - [GSC showing four different error types on mobile pages since early August](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Page speed improvements needed for both mobile and desktop versions](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)

### Location Pages Optimization

  - [Improve internal linking by adding buttons linking to city pages from state pages](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Create a directory-style page in the footer with links to all location pages](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [These changes aim to improve indexing and crawlability of city and state-level pages](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)

### Review Page Enhancement

  - [Suggestion to add a prominent bar linking to a case study or G2 review page](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [This could improve conversion rates and boost the visibility/ranking of the review page](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Reconfigure Condition Hub plan with focus on tier 3, more long-tail content](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [Akina to follow up in Slack with questions about site performance issues](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
  - [Create a ticket for Philippe to prioritize cleaning up core web vitals and other technical SEO issues](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [GrowthX to outline potential inverted content strategy focusing on solutions first](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Implement suggested improvements for location pages and review page](https://fathom.video/share/disRzzsUTZqTp7dPbTZyxCyz3M1Qc2yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
